title: The biological clock that doomed the Neanderthals - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses a biological clock hypothesis as a factor in Neanderthal extinction. The title frames a specific causal mechanism (biological clock) for why Neanderthals disappeared. This appears to be scientific commentary or debate rather than a technique or tool being presented.
